stories.title: Fix cookie consent banner to not overlap footer
stories.description: The cookie consent banner in src/ui/src/components/CookieConsent.jsx uses fixed/absolute positioning that overlaps the footer copyright row and 'Zen Labs' attribution. Fix: change the banner from position:fixed to a normal-flow element inserted BEFORE the footer (not overlaying it). If the user hasn't dismissed consent, render the banner as a full-width bar at the bottom of the page flow (not fixed). When dismissed (localStorage has consent), don't render it at all. Remove any z-index hacks. The banner should push the page taller, not cover content. GitHub issue #399.
acceptance_criteria: Banner does not overlap any footer text
Banner is in normal document flow (not position:fixed)
After dismissal, banner is not rendered
Footer copyright line fully visible when banner is shown

stories.title: Reduce gap between hero and checker form
stories.description: On desktop (1440px), there's a ~150px empty dark gap between the hero CTA button and the checker form. In src/ui/src/App.jsx the homepage renders <Hero /><Checker /> sequentially. The gap comes from bottom padding/margin on HeroAscii.jsx and/or top padding on Checker.jsx. Reduce to ~40-60px gap. Check: HeroAscii section has min-h-[70vh] — this may push the checker down. Consider reducing to min-h-[60vh] or adding negative margin on Checker. GitHub issue #403.
acceptance_criteria: Gap between hero CTA and checker form is 40-60px on desktop
Hero still looks good on mobile (no content clipping)
